author: jamescvermont-cyber
description: OKCupid-style compatibility game. Find out if you're compatible across 800+ topics — food, music, lifestyle, romance, and more. Tracks all-time history per pair.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user IDs and game answer history permanently in a local SQLite database.
install_msg: Requires aiosqlite: `pip install aiosqlite`. Then `[p]load incommon`.
name: AreWeCompatible
short: Find out if you're compatible with someone
